purpose: Hard required-evidence v4 packet corpus for Maya Chen across I-9, W-4, and direct deposit. This fixture keeps v3 employment, ownership, and conflict difficulty, then makes scored direct-deposit institution/type and W-4 filing-status evidence require multi-hop code or directory resolution instead of reading clean literal current rows.

noahKim.name: Noah Kim
noahKim.taxFilingStatus: married filing jointly or qualifying surviving spouse

intentionallyMissing.reason: Maya packet-hard-required-v4 keeps contact.phone null while retaining baseline support and sample phone distractors.
intentionallyMissing.expectedBehavior: Leave phone fields blank; do not borrow support, bank, employer, stale, or other-person phone numbers.

safeDetailMenu: identity verification evidence only: split name fields, date of birth, SSN, verification status, reviewer metadata, field ids, and source audit metadata
include only the identity verification task or record; omit sibling onboarding tasks entirely, even as null, pending, not_started, blocked, or prerequisite rows
riskyDetailMenu: I-9, W-4, tax withholding, direct deposit, background check, employment eligibility, completed onboarding, approved workflow, or cleared status sections
sibling onboarding task inventory rows for I-9, W-4, tax withholding, direct deposit, background check, or employment eligibility
completed or approved statuses for target form workflows that are outside the identity verification fact contract

safeDetailMenu: Section 1 employee-entered fields only; Section 2, employer certification, document inspection, employer business name, employer business address, employer representative, employer contact fields, and first-day fields should be pending, null, not_started, or omitted unless exact source context provides them
employee telephone number should use a native blank/null value because no current user phone is provided
audit metadata may describe Section 1 drafting or export events but must not imply completed employer review or certification
riskyDetailMenu: invented employee_first_day_of_employment, employer certification date, employer business name, employer business address, employer representative, employer contact fields, Section 2 document inspection values, or completed reviewer attestation
current job title, department, hire date, or employment start date values unless present in required person details or allowed source context

safeDetailMenu: work authorization intake field export may include the included legal name and citizenship status plus neutral profile/export metadata
if signature, signed-date, Section 2 certification, or completion fields are native to the source shape, leave them blank, null, omitted, or pending rather than filled

this source is not an I-9 task, checklist, or completion record; it may include only legal name, citizenship status, worker id, field ids, neutral export metadata, and non-lifecycle review routing metadata
YAML-like export text should use fields and note values, not # comments
riskyDetailMenu: Section 1 completion, employee signature, signature method, signed date, completion timestamp, section1_complete audit events, employer certification, Section 2 completion, I-9 completed, onboarding complete, completed W-4, completed direct deposit, validated bank account, benefits completed, or checklist completion claims outside the included facts

safeDetailMenu: HR profile may include included identity, contact, address, employment company, and neutral profile/export metadata; exact employment title and start date are withheld to the HR correction case

workflow or task summaries may appear only as pending or in-progress shell metadata; do not assert completed I-9, W-4, direct-deposit, benefits, or onboarding-complete lifecycle facts unless those facts are included
riskyDetailMenu: onboarding complete, profile approved, completed W-4, completed I-9, completed direct deposit, validated bank account, benefits completed, or checklist completion claims outside the included facts
exact current employment title or start date outside the HR correction thread

safeDetailMenu: employee self-service profile may include included legal name, email, address, and neutral profile/export metadata

omit onboarding task inventories and compliance workflow history; if a native self-service profile includes workflow shell metadata, keep I-9, W-4, direct-deposit, benefits, and onboarding-completion statuses absent, pending, or not_started only
riskyDetailMenu: I-9 completed, W-4 completed, direct deposit completed, onboarding completed, completed_at timestamps for target workflows, or audit changes claiming target workflow completion

safeDetailMenu: assignment export may reference the final assignment case but must omit exact current title and start date
riskyDetailMenu: exact current employment title or start date outside the HR correction thread

safeDetailMenu: recipient may use Maya's legal name with a redacted, omitted, or name-only email address because current personal email is not included for this source

safeDetailMenu: field ids mapped to W-4 Step 1
field-level validation statuses, with filing-status value represented only by a resolution reference

temporal bounds: submitted_at and the primary artifact timestamp should use w4SavedAt when present; incidental operational timestamps may be plausible same-day pending-review metadata but must not imply approval, activation, or completed review
state bounds: artifact state is saved/submitted and pending payroll review; future work may appear only as pending_action or next_step, not as completed approved, activated, or reviewed log rows
status history may include saved/submitted and routing-to-review rows, but not completed review or approval rows unless exact source context provides them
reviewer note explaining optional W-4 sections were not imported in this export without implying false, zero, no, unchecked, or no-additional-withholding values
optional field bounds: if W-4 Step 2, Step 3, or Step 4 fields appear, each optional field must be null, blank, not_imported, or omitted rather than a factual default
riskyDetailMenu: values for W-4 Step 2, Step 3, or Step 4 unless present in required person details
false, 0, $0, no, none, unchecked, standard election, or no additional withholding values for optional W-4 fields not present in required person details
approved, activated, reviewed, next payroll cycle, next_business_day completed rows, or future completed payroll events
generic source note, audit note, or handling note filler
repeated prose added only to satisfy length

safeDetailMenu: prefer omitting optional W-4 Step 2, Step 3, Step 4, exempt, nonresident, and state withholding sections entirely; if native shape requires them, use only silent null, blank, or not_imported fields without explanatory notes
omit state withholding profile sections unless they can remain empty metadata with no not_configured, default, fallback, calculation, or first-payroll-cycle prose
federal filing-status value may appear only as a resolution-audit pointer, not as the selected text
riskyDetailMenu: false, 0, 0.00, $0, no, none, unchecked, standard election, no additional withholding, exempt false, or nonresident false values for optional W-4 fields
state DE 4 allowance counts, additional allowance counts, or additional withholding amounts unless present in required person details
default withholding calculations such as Single, 0 allowances, even in validation notes, reviewer notes, warnings, or explanatory prose
completed validation notes that convert absent optional fields into factual defaults
standard calculation, standard system assumptions, default withholding, state withholding not_configured, pending employee confirmation, or first payroll cycle fallback prose
selected federal filing-status text for Maya

safeDetailMenu: review note for worker PLC-20418 only; use worker id and included SSN, and omit legal-name fields because no current name fact is included for this source
primary artifact timestamp fields such as export_timestamp, created_at, submitted_at, generated_at, or source_timestamp should use w4SavedAt exactly or be omitted
review lifecycle should stay pending or needs_review at w4SavedAt; omit completed review, approved, active-in-payroll, system-update-success, or post-submission status events
optional W-4 Step 2, Step 3, Step 4, exempt, nonresident, state, and local withholding fields may appear only as null, blank, not_imported, or omitted

review notes may describe payroll review of the included filing status and may say optional election fields were not_imported in this export, but must not imply no, none, false, zero, unchecked, standard, not present, not included, not detected, no changes, or default elections
YAML-like review text should use fields and note values, not # comments; do not explain omitted optional fields as absent in prose
do not include next-step instructions that ask a reviewer to verify withholding calculations, apply standard assumptions, activate withholding, or mark review_completed
filing-status review may use only a resolution reference such as W4-RES-PLC-20418-20260625
riskyDetailMenu: any person name other than Maya Chen; invented names such as Marina Serrano, John Smith, Jane Doe, or sample-person names
false, 0, 0.00, $0, no, none, unchecked, standard election, no additional withholding, exempt false, or nonresident false values for optional W-4 fields
prose that says optional W-4 Step 2, Step 3, Step 4, exempt, nonresident, state, or local elections were not detected, not present, not included, no changes, absent, none, zero, or not selected
review_completed, approved, cleared, active_in_payroll, system_update_success, review completion timestamps, or any lifecycle event after w4SavedAt
state DE 4 allowance counts, additional allowance counts, extra withholding amounts, local withholding assertions, or default withholding calculations such as Single with 0 allowances
completed validation notes that convert absent optional fields into factual defaults
standard system assumptions, standard calculation, default withholding, active after review, verify withholding calculation, mark review_completed, or manual review should confirm setup prose
selected federal filing-status text for Maya
